content:
Hello gents...
Time to tighten up the plan for a Beta release date.
Lets go around the horn again and poll status of the code base. Leaving aside (for the moment) the User Manual refactor and update, who is working on a feature/enhancement/bug-fix that really needs to be in O5.10?

For me, I'm done with big visible feature-like things. Plowing through the github issues list, one-by-one.
Others?
I still think I will be able to finish https://github.com/OpenCPN/OpenCPN/issues/3182 over the weekend, that is the last bigger thing I am working on for 5.10
@Pavel Kalian Any news on #3182?

CirclleCI macOS builds fail because of the brownout before Intel builders are decomisioned next week. Tha catch is they did not make the M1 builders available to the free plans. Let's hope they will and the builds should probably just keep working.

Just about ready to tag and publish Beta-2.
Status check all around, please.
Any blocking tasks?
OK. Let us not forget new package build chain check

I think I've found the bug for this CF post
PR to come soon.

Blocking task?
If the first start wizard crash on my RPi's is not a show stopper? Or is just my system?

The stacktrace you posted does not seem to have anything to do with the wizard (looks to be in the check for multiple OpenCPN instances running at the same time) and I can't reproduce it. If you try to pinpoint what exactly makes it crash, we may fix it.
